description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rocker/verse:3.4.3 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs Rscript -e "install.packages(c('here','knitr','readxl','tidyverse','htmltools'))" then Rscript -e "bookdown::render_book('index.Rmd','all',output_dir='public')". The job publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact and runs only on the master branch.
